lead.title: British Politician Ann Widdecombe Was Murdered with a Hammer, Prosecutors Say
lead.snippet: The politician, Ann Widdecombe, was eating lunch at home when a man walked in and asked whether she had bank cards, security footage showed.

items.title: Trump Escalates Canada Tariffs as Mark Carney Holds Firm

items.title: Houthis in Yemen Edge Closer to Entering U.S.-Iran War

lead.title: Instagram now lets you swap out the music in your old posts

items.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
